resources.string: Flips TickTick\'s Pro gate by resolving User.isPro through a Rosetta map (no hard-coded obfuscated names).
Pro is ENABLED. Tap “Force-restart TickTick” for it to take effect.
Pro is disabled. TickTick behaves normally.

TickPatch hooks com.ticktick.task.data.User#isPro() and forces it to return true while this switch is on. The obfuscated names are resolved at runtime from a bundled Rosetta map, so a TickTick update only needs a new map — not a new build.
